raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2806 will prohibit suspensions and expulsions in early learning and care programs.",
    "The bill will eliminate exclusionary practices in preschool and child care settings.",
    "Suspensions and expulsions will only be used as a last resort in extraordinary circumstances under the new legislation.",
    "AB 2806 provides early learning and care providers with early childhood mental health consultation services.",
    "The inclusion of early childhood mental health consultation services will help create inclusive and anti-bias environments.",
    "Creating anti-bias environments can buffer the effects of trauma and support optimal child development.",
    "The legislation aims to increase positive outcomes for young learners.",
    "Discriminatory expulsion and suspension practices negatively impact at-risk children.",
    "The legislation will improve access to high-quality early education in a more equitable way.",
    "Early childhood mental health consultation plays a critical role in improving conditions in early childhood education programs.",
    "Inequitable access to trauma-informed and inclusive environments contributes to discriminatory practices in early learning settings.",
    "The school readiness gap and academic achievement gap contribute to the school-to-prison pipeline.",
    "The signing of AB 2806 addresses harsh and racist disciplinary actions against students of color."
  ]
}
```
